item.title: Selling the Bad Company Square Body!
item.description: The Bad Company Square Body moved on. Rob Pitts walked through the story behind the sale and what made this truck so special.

media:content.media:title: Selling the Bad Company Square Body!
media:content.media:description: The Bad Company Square Body moved on. Rob Pitts walked through the story behind the sale and what made this truck so special.

item.title: Buying a Rare 1994 Truck 8,000 Miles Away!
item.description: When Rob Pitts found a rare 1994 truck 8,000 miles away, he didn't hesitate. Follow along as he tracks it down and brings it home.

media:content.media:title: Buying a Rare 1994 Truck 8,000 Miles Away!
media:content.media:description: When Rob Pitts found a rare 1994 truck 8,000 miles away, he didn't hesitate. Follow along as he tracks it down and brings it home.

item.title: College Kid Steals 2.2 Million Dollars
item.description: In this story, Rob Pitts uncovers how one college student orchestrated a $2.2 million car theft scheme that left investigators stunned.

media:content.media:title: College Kid Steals 2.2 Million Dollars
media:content.media:description: In this story, Rob Pitts uncovers how one college student orchestrated a $2.2 million car theft scheme that left investigators stunned.

item.title: Easiest Money Rabbit Ever Made!
item.description: What do you think about this story?

media:content.media:title: Easiest Money Rabbit Ever Made!
media:content.media:description: What do you think about this story?

item.title: Work Truck Millionaire: Ol’ Smiley’s Tough Chevy
item.description: A look at Ol’ Smiley’s tough Chevy work truck, exploring its history, durability, and how it became a symbol of hard work and success.

media:content.media:title: Work Truck Millionaire: Ol’ Smiley’s Tough Chevy
media:content.media:description: A look at Ol’ Smiley’s tough Chevy work truck, exploring its history, durability, and how it became a symbol of hard work and success.

item.title: Rabbit’s Favorite Moneymaker: Lucky Charm Chevy Nova
item.description: A look at Rabbit’s favorite moneymaker, a Chevy Nova with a story of reliability, performance, and the role it played in his success.

media:content.media:title: Rabbit’s Favorite Moneymaker: Lucky Charm Chevy Nova
media:content.media:description: A look at Rabbit’s favorite moneymaker, a Chevy Nova with a story of reliability, performance, and the role it played in his success.

item.title: Hunting for a Rare Car Across the World
item.description: Follow the journey to track down a rare car across the globe, exploring the challenges, discoveries, and passion behind the search.

media:content.media:title: Hunting for a Rare Car Across the World
media:content.media:description: Follow the journey to track down a rare car across the globe, exploring the challenges, discoveries, and passion behind the search.
